claim_boundary: The fixed gamma_c branch is a post hoc near-tie, not independent evidence. The covariant relation is kinematically complete but physically unclosed; all one-degree extensions fail; the radial/transverse fit is an empirical Lambda-CDM-like coordinate; the frozen DR2 failure is cross-led and lacks 1% independent-survey replication. Further physical sampling is not authorised without an action-level clock/photon/ruler model and validated adapter.
